title: Smooth Journey
description: A lightweight optimization modpack for Fabric.
body:
<details>
<summary>If you want to install the Forge version of this modpack:
</summary>
  
[Smooth Journey Forge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smooth-journey-forge)

[Smooth Journey Forge(Lite Version)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smooth-journey-forge-(lite-version))

</details>

<details>
<summary>If you want to install the lite version of this modpack:</summary>

[Smooth Journey(Lite Version)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smooth-journey(lite-version))

</details>

---

This modpack tries to optimize Minecraft by using some optimized mods such as 
[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)  and  [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling),while adding some utility mods like 
[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [World Preview](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-preview).\
Besides,it contains some good resoucepacks and shaders to provide a better visual experience.
(you can see them below)\
**You can know this modpack's features supported by some great mods in the "Features:" below.**\
At last,it's enjoyable for me to make a modpack.I hope you enjoy it.

<details>
<summary>Included mods,resourcepacks and shaders:</summary>
  
You can also go to [the Versions page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smooth-journey/versions) to know them.

<details>
<summary>Features:(Mod Name : Features)</summary>

Axolotl Item Fix:
- Makes the axolotl bucket item show the right axolotl type.

Better Add Server:
- saving when you press enter
- automatically filling in the server name when you enter the IP
- even converting names of existing servers using the default name "Minecraft Server" to more recognisable ones

Better Ping Display:
- Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list.

Better Statistics Screen:
- Improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful.

Broken Lead Warner

Carpet Mod:
- Takes full control over your vanilla game.
- Use command /carpet in your game to open its menu.
- Use command /carpet language to change language.
- (Can't use on servers which don't install this mod)

Chat Heads:
- Adds player heads next to their chat messages.

Chat Patches:
- Touches up a few aspects of Minecraft's mundane chat, with as much configurability as possible!

Cherished Worlds:
- Favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds, which will always be at the top of the list and cannot be deleted.

Controlling:
- Adds the ability to search for keybinds using their name in the KeyBinding menu, this allows players to easily find a key binding in the menu.

Fabrishot:
- Press F9(default) to take high resolution screenshots.

Inventory HUD +:
- Show you your inventory , armor and potion effects while playing.
- Press O(default) to open config screen.

Isometric Renders:
- Creates high-resolution isometric screenshots of game objects.
- Use command /isorender to see its wiki.

Jade:
- Shows what you are looking at.

LAN World Plug-n-Play:
- When opening a world to LAN:
- Allows you to enable or disable pvp.
- Allows you to change server motd.
- Allows you to control other players' op permissions.
- Allows you to control how many players can join your world.

lazy-language-loader:
- Only reload the language instead of all the game resources when changing your language.

Mica:
- Enable Mica or Acrylic on Windows 11 21H2 22000 or later.

Music Notification:
- Display a toast notification when music is played in game.
- Provide a gui that allows you to play any music or sounds.

NotEnoughAnimations:
- Adding and improving animations in Third-Person.

Notes:
- Fully functional, clientside, in-game notepad.

Paperdoll:
- Get a customizable (bedrock like) preview of yourself.

Puzzle:
- Provide a united config for OptiFine replacement mods.
- (You can find it in the option menu next to the FOV or search it in the mod menu)

Quick Menu:
- Adds a configurable easy-to-access menu that runs basic repetitive commands.
- Hold G(default) to open its menu.

Resource Reload (F3+T) Everywhere

Resourcify:
- In-game resource pack, data pack and shader browser and updater.

Roughly Enough Items:
- Clean and Customizable. An easy way to browse recipes.

ScoreboardHelper:
- Provides a few extra functions to use Minecraft Scoreboard more easily.
- Press \(default) to export scoreboard.
- Press .(default) to edit score.

Simple Voice Chat

Symbol Chat:
- Adds a symbol/emoji menu as well as writing in different unicode fonts.

Tooltip Scroll:
- Allows the tooltip GUI to be moved with the scrollwheel or configurable keys.

ViaFabricPlus:
- Fabric mod to connect to EVERY Minecraft server version (Release, Beta, Alpha, Classic, Snapshots, Bedrock) with QoL fixes to the gameplay.

World preview:
- Allows you to preview a map in the new world screen.

Xaero's World Map:
- Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world.

Inventory Profiles Next:
- Help you sort your inventory.

Litematica:
- A modern schematic mod.
- Press J(default) to open its menu.
- Press F10(default) to toggle the Easy Place mode.
- Press F12(default) to execute the currently selected tool operation.

Tweakeroo:
- Adds a bunch of configurable client-side tweaks.
- Press F7(default) to toggle FreeCamera.
- Press F8(default) to toggle GammaOverride.
- Hold C(default) to zoom.
- Look at a chest/shulkerbox and hold Alt(default) to see what's in it.
- Hold Shift(default) on a map in your inventory to see what it looks like.
- Hold Shift(default) on a shulkerbox in your inventory to see what's in it.

Item Scroller:
- Adds various shortcuts to move items easier in inventory screens.
- Search it in the mod menu to open its config screen.

MiniHUD:
- Allows displaying various "info lines" on the screen ("mini-F3").
- Press H(default) to open or close its HUD.

CustomHUD:
- A highly configurable variable-based text HUD.
- Search it in the mod menu to open its config screen.

Yes Steve Model:
- Allows players to customize player models and animations as they wish.

</details>



---
### Frame rate test(on my computer)(same settings)

| Test                | Vanilla               | Smooth Journey       |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|:--------------------:|
| Look at sky         | 720                   | 870                  |
| Look at a village (same seed)| 270              | 275              |
| Look at 1331 chests (use _**/fill ~ ~ ~ ~10 ~10 ~10 chest**_ to generate)| 300              | 500    |
